---
title: "User Guide"
---

::: {.callout-note}
A step-by-step guide to the Shiny application will be added here as the app is developed.
:::

## Getting Started

*(To be completed — how to open the app, the shared sidebar filters, and each module.)*

## The Shared Sidebar

*(To be completed.)*

## Module 1 — Interaction Network

*(To be completed.)*

## Module 2 — Temporal Anomaly

*(To be completed.)*

## Module 3 — Internal-State Explorer

*(To be completed.)*
